T003.did: Moved the card border/radius/background onto the outer .inline-editor wrapper so the composer renders as one bordered card.

T004.did: Restructured InlineEditor JSX into a single .inline-editor card with stacked header/body/footer regions, keeping all props and callbacks wired identically.

T005.did: Styled the header/body/footer regions so they sit flush within the single card boundary with no internal separators.

T006.did: Updated the LineMode story to render the single-card paragraph layout via shared args.

T007.did: Removed the standalone .editor-actions block and rendered getContextActions buttons in the footer left group with unchanged data-action/onClick wiring.

T008.did: Made the footer a flex row with justify-content space-between so secondary actions sit left and primary actions right, with flex-wrap for the multi-action task case.

T009.did: Added TaskMode, SectionMode, and UserStoryMode stories covering the distinct secondary-action sets.

T010.did: Rendered the card header: line mode shows a target label, row mode folds the scenario context (label + text) into the header region.

T011.did: Styled the header with overflow-wrap so long context wraps gracefully and kept primary footer actions right-aligned and non-shrinking.

T012.did: Kept row mode returning the tr/td wrapper with the new header/body/footer card inside the cell and no secondary action.

T013.did: Updated the RowMode story so the scenario shows in the card header with right-aligned primary actions.

T014.did: Removed dead .editor-actions and inner .editor-comment-area/.editor-comment-section CSS left behind by the relocation, preserving context-action/textarea/button styling.

T017.did: Ran npm run compile and npm run compile-web; both the extension (tsc) and the webview (webpack) build with no errors.

T001.did: Confirmed the extension + webview compile cleanly before/after changes via npm run compile and npm run compile-web.

T002.did: Skipped the manual Storybook baseline capture — requires a human-driven Storybook session.
concerns: Storybook visual baseline (T002) is a manual step and was not run by the AI.

concerns: Behavior regression (Cmd/Ctrl+Enter persist, Escape, auto-focus, empty-submit, lifecycle gating) needs a manual viewer pass.
